title: Healthcare and Mobile-first Platforms — United Kingdom
summary: Healthcare communications, portal, CMS, webcast, and mobile-first platform work in the United Kingdom.
body:
Healthcare communications and portal work in the United Kingdom covers Roche, Pfizer, and Vantas across webcast, CMS, and mobile-first platform delivery.

Included projects
- Digital Video Webcasts — Roche
- Pfizer Health Portal CMS
- Mobile-first Web Portals — Vantas

Strategic and technical themes
- Digital-platform and communications design in healthcare and medtech-adjacent settings.
- CMS and portal architecture where clarity, trust, and usability matter.
- Mobile-first experience thinking for practical adoption across constrained user contexts.
- Delivery focused on platform and communication outcomes rather than unsupported clinical claims.

Proof connection
- This record is intentionally descriptive and does not introduce unsupported medical, clinical, or quantified outcome claims.

Retrieval guidance
- Use this record for UK healthcare-platform questions, Roche, Pfizer, Vantas, webcasts, health portals, or mobile-first portal work.

claims: Joz worked on healthcare communications and digital platforms in the United Kingdom for Roche, Pfizer, and Vantas.
The programme covered webcasts, portal CMS work, and mobile-first platforms without implying clinical ownership.
proof_points: This record is scoped to platform and communication delivery rather than medical or clinical claims.
A dedicated healthcare industry tag is used because the existing ontology previously lacked one.
metadata.source_notes: Grouped programme record. Healthcare industry ID added because the controlled ontology previously lacked a safe healthcare bucket.
